about.subtitle: About us
about.title: Tradition and care
about.story: For over 50 years in the heart of Penha, Pousada Rosália has been lovingly maintained by
about.storyEnd: — a native family who turned their home into a haven for travelers. Here, every guest is treated like family.

features.title: 1 km from Beto Carrero
features.desc: Just minutes from the largest theme park in Latin America

features.title: Breakfast included
features.desc: Homemade flavors every day, from 8am to 10am

features.title: Free transportation
features.desc: Our Madagaskombi takes you to the park in style

roomsPreview.subtitle: Accommodations
roomsPreview.title: Comfort for your rest
roomsPreview.description: Rooms designed for families, couples and friends to feel at home, with all the comfort you deserve.

cards.title: Breakfast
cards.subtitle: Delicious and varied
cards.text: Served daily from 8am to 10am with fresh bread, fruits, homemade cakes and delicious savory snacks prepared with love.

cards.title: Madagaskombi
cards.subtitle: Exclusive transport
cards.text: One of our favorite attractions! Free and exclusive transportation to Beto Carrero World in our famous Madagaskombi.

cards.title: Leisure Area
cards.subtitle: For all ages
cards.text: Children's playground for kids and a cozy rest area for adults to relax peacefully.

cards.title: Beach & Shops
cards.subtitle: Everything nearby
cards.text: 5 minutes walk from the beach and surrounded by markets, pharmacies, restaurants and bakeries — everything you need.

items.name: Rodrigo Capitano
items.text: On foot, Pousada Rosália is 5 minutes from the beach and less than 5 minutes from a wide range of shops. The inn itself is charming. You can see the care in every detail. Comfortable room, impeccable breakfast. We loved everything!

items.name: Bernardo Kowalsky
items.text: Pousada Rosália is, for me, the best inn in Penha! They have a great structure and spectacular service. I feel at home when I go there, always very well received. They even have transportation to the park!

items.name: Maria Eduarda
items.text: Wonderful place! We were enchanted by the hospitality of Uncle Mica and Aunt Néia. The breakfast is incredible and the Madagaskombi is a unique experience. We will definitely return!

items.name: Felipe Andrade
items.text: Best value for money in the region! Clean and comfortable rooms, delicious breakfast and a prime location. The team is super attentive and helpful.

faq.subtitle: FAQ
faq.title: Questions and answers
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about Pousada Rosália.

items.question: How far is the inn from Beto Carrero World?
items.answer: Pousada Rosália is just 1 km from Beto Carrero World, with quick and easy access. We offer free transportation to the park in our famous Madagaskombi!

items.question: Is breakfast included in the daily rate?
items.answer: Yes! Our delicious breakfast is included in all rates. Served daily from 8am to 10am, with fresh bread, seasonal fruits, homemade cakes and assorted savories.

items.question: Do you offer transportation to the park?
items.answer: Yes! We offer free and exclusive transportation to Beto Carrero World in our famous Madagaskombi. It's a unique experience that our guests love!

items.question: What room options are available?
items.answer: We offer Double, Triple (with and without balcony), Quadruple (with and without balcony) and Quintuple rooms with balcony. All equipped with air conditioning, TV, mini fridge and Wi-Fi.

items.question: Is there parking at the inn?
items.answer: Yes, we offer free parking for all guests within the inn's grounds.

items.question: Does the inn accept pets?
items.answer: To ensure the comfort of all guests, please check our pet-friendly policy directly via WhatsApp, as it varies by season and availability.

items.question: Is there Wi-Fi at the inn?
items.answer: Yes! Free, quality Wi-Fi throughout the inn, including rooms and common areas.

items.question: How do I make a reservation?
items.answer: Reservations are made exclusively via WhatsApp. Just click any 'Contact Us' button on the site or send a message to (47) 98805-9849. We respond quickly!

items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
items.answer: We accept PIX, cash, credit and debit cards. For more details on special conditions, get in touch via WhatsApp.

items.question: Is the inn close to the beach?
items.answer: Yes! The beach is approximately 5 minutes walk from the inn. We are also surrounded by markets, pharmacies, restaurants and other shops.

location.subtitle: How to Get Here
location.title: Our Location
location.description: Perfectly located on one of the most prestigious avenues in Penha. Everything you need just steps away.

cta.title: Ready to live this experience?
cta.subtitle: Get in touch and secure your stay at the best inn in Penha. We are waiting for you!

footer.brand: Tradition, comfort and the hospitality you deserve, just 1km from the largest theme park in Latin America.

rooms.heroDesc: 6 options for every type of traveler
rooms.introText: Elegance and comfort in every detail. Our rooms were designed so that families, couples and friends feel perfectly at home.

items.description: The double room features a comfortable double bed, mini fridge, soft towels, TV and complete bed linen. Also equipped with hot and cold air conditioning.
items.whatsMsg: Hello! I'm interested in the Double Room at Pousada Rosália. Could you tell me about availability?

items.description: Equipped with a double bed and a single bed, mini fridge, soft towels, TV and complete bed linen, plus hot and cold air conditioning.
items.whatsMsg: Hello! I'm interested in the Triple Room (no balcony) at Pousada Rosália. Could you tell me about availability?

items.description: Ideal for those seeking comfort with an extra outdoor space. Equipped with double bed, single bed, air conditioning, mini fridge and TV.
items.whatsMsg: Hello! I'm interested in the Triple Room with Balcony at Pousada Rosália. Could you tell me about availability?

items.description: Perfect for families needing more space. Double bed and single beds, mini fridge, air conditioning, TV and great comfort.
items.whatsMsg: Hello! I'm interested in the Quadruple Room at Pousada Rosália. Could you tell me about availability?

items.description: Spacious with a private balcony for up to four people, with excellent ventilation, natural lighting and practicality.

items.description: Our largest room, designed for groups or larger families. Stands out for its ample interior space and balcony that integrates the environment.
